articles.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
articles.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

articles.title: Justin Sun's HTX 'Rotating' On-Chain Wallets Amid UK Sanctions: TRM Labs
articles.description: TRM Labs says the UK-sanctioned exchange has rotated hot wallets across blockchains, leaving address-list screening struggling to keep pace.

articles.title: Satsuma Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Liquidation, London Delisting
articles.description: Bitcoin Magazine Satsuma Shareholders Approve Bitcoin Liquidation, London Delisting Satsuma shareholders voted to sell the company's bitcoin, return the cash to investors, and delist from the London Stock Exchange, ending its run as a bitcoin treasury company after heavy losses. articles.title: Kalshi rolls out Midterm Hubs ahead of the November elections in the U.S.
articles.description: The prediction markets platform seeks to position itself as the primary source for election odds ahead of the midterm elections this year.

articles.title: Bitcoin analysis eyes ‘serious volume’ after Binance sees 9K BTC daily outflow
articles.description: Binance set multimonth records for net BTC outflows on Tuesday, adding to an emerging trend of positive inflows to the US spot Bitcoin ETFs.

articles.title: Morning Minute: OpenAI Model Escapes Containment, Hacks Hugging Face
articles.description: Plus, the BTC ETFs stay green. The Clarity Act hits a wall over who enforces the ethics rules. And Jack Mallers walks away from XXI Capital.

articles.title: Zilliqa Ledger app vulnerability lets attackers recover signer’s private keys
articles.description: A security vulnerability in the Zilliqa Ledger app is enabling attackers to reconstruct private keys using publicly available onchain data.

articles.title: Midnight token rebounds 19% after Wanchain bridge hack, Hoskinson calls for ZK revamp
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson says the exploit, which briefly sent NIGHT to an all-time low, underscores why the industry needs to move beyond legacy bridge infrastructure.

articles.title: US seeks forfeiture of $25M in crypto tied to romance, investment scams
articles.description: US prosecutors are seeking more than $25 million in cryptocurrency allegedly connected to international fraud and laundering networks.

articles.title: Here's why bitcoin bulls should take a closer look at interest rates
articles.description: Your day-ahead look for July 22, 2026

articles.title: SecondFi to shut down after $2.4 million ADA wallet theft
articles.description: The breach stemmed from a vulnerability in transaction signing software that enabled the derivation of private keys from blockchain transaction data.

articles.title: Jack Dorsey's Block Launches Buzz, a Nostr-Based Slack and GitHub Rival for AI Agents
articles.description: The free, open source workspace runs on Nostr, gives AI agents their own cryptographic identities, and challenges Slack and GitHub.

articles.title: Talos brings institutional trading tools to Kalshi prediction markets
articles.description: The integration provides institutional clients with access to Kalshi’s event contracts and crypto perpetuals via Talos’ existing trading infrastructure.

articles.title: Crypto institutions look beyond audits as trust signals falter: Hacken
articles.description: Institutional due diligence is shifting toward continuous monitoring, signer controls and incident readiness after operational failures accounted for most crypto losses.

articles.title: South Korea crypto volumes shrink as retail investors shift to stocks
articles.description: Trading activity on South Korea’s five major crypto exchanges fell sharply as the KOSPI surged, signaling a shift in retail investors toward equities.

articles.title: Bitcoin retreats from one-month high as oil tops $85, inflation concerns resurface
articles.description: BTC retreated from a one-month high as WTI crude topped $85 for the first time since June, reigniting inflation concerns and pushing investors toward gold, silver and the safety of bitcoin over altcoins.

articles.title: Kraken parent expands tokenized stocks to Hong Kong, UK and South Korea equities
articles.description: Payward's xStocks pushes beyond U.S. equities as competition to bring global stock markets onchain accelerates.

articles.title: Foundry asks Bitcoin miners to vote on BIP-110 support
articles.description: Foundry USA asked its mining customers to signal their support for BIP-110, an actively debated proposal seeking to shrink the amount of data that can be stored in a Bitcoin transaction.

articles.title: SecondFi to wind down after $2.6M ADA theft linked to wallet flaw
articles.description: SecondFi will wind down after a $2.6 million ADA theft, while users still await recovery tools that were initially expected within weeks of the exploit.

articles.title: Galaxy pledges $5M for developers quantum-proofing Bitcoin
articles.description: Galaxy pledged up to $5 million in grants for developers working on Bitcoin’s quantum security and elected a council of quantum-advisory experts to research quantum-resistant migration solutions.

articles.title: Balance stablecoin collapses 99% after $1 million exploit drains its bitcoin vaults
articles.description: An attacker fed the lending system a fake, abnormally low bitcoin price, liquidated vaults that should have been safe, and pocketed the difference in a single transaction.

articles.title: Live updates: Bitcoin slips under $66,000 as oil's surge sacks strength from risk markets
articles.description: Later on Wednesday, Alphabet's earnings should give a sign of whether the hundreds of billions going into AI is paying off.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs extend inflow streak to 6 days with $203M added
articles.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their inflow streak to six sessions, bringing in about $930 million while remaining down $4.84 billion on a net basis year to date.

articles.title: AI models escaped OpenAI’s sandbox and hit Hugging Face. Crypto is where that gets dangerous
articles.description: OpenAI said the systems had their cyber guardrails lowered for an internal benchmark, but the incident shows how autonomous exploit chains could pose a deeper threat to smart contracts.

articles.title: Bitcoin holds near $66,300 as chips extend their rally and the yen hits a 40-year low
articles.description: Semiconductor stocks led a second day of gains on AI optimism, while the yen slid past 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986.

articles.title: Balance Coin crashes 99% after reported $915K exploit
articles.description: The attack allowed the exploiter to liquidate multiple Bitcoin-backed vaults before swapping the assets for profit.

articles.title: OpenAI says AI models escaped containment to hack Hugging Face
articles.description: OpenAI called it an “unprecedented cyber incident” after its AI models broke out of their sandbox to hack an AI startup during a security evaluation.

articles.title: Balaji’s Network School turns to Kazakhstan amid Malaysia setback
articles.description: The agreement gives Balaji Srinivasan’s tech community a potential new base as Malaysian authorities clamp down on the Network School over alleged licensing breaches.

articles.title: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
articles.description: The UK Bitcoin treasury company raised $218 million less than a year ago. Now it's returning whatever is left.

articles.title: Crypto lobby group Digital Chamber sues Illinois to block digital asset tax
articles.description: Illinois enacted a 0.2% tax on all crypto transactions last month, with the tax taking effect next year.

articles.title: Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
articles.description: Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node The proposal to temporarily restrict arbitrary data in Bitcoin transactions lacks economic nodes, protocol developers, and hashrate. History from the 2017 UASF shows nodes succeed only with broad investor and developer weight behind them. This

articles.title: CLARITY Act could help CFTC deal with prediction markets: Lawyer
articles.description: According to one lawyer testifying before a House subcommittee hearing, the CLARITY Act could grant the CFTC the authority it needs to address the “explosive growth of prediction markets.”

articles.title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
articles.description: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

articles.title: Crypto Clarity Act still at mercy of ethics section as Democrats balk at Trump deal
articles.description: The White House has circulated some details of the conflict-of-interest limits the president agreed to with Republican negotiators, but talks are still underway.

articles.description: Bitcoin Magazine Bitcoin Maxi Jack Dorsey Unveils New Open Source Group Chat App Jack Dorsey's company Block has debuted a decentralized rival to group chat platform Slack. articles.title: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after months of MOVE token turmoil
articles.description: The blockchain developer will continue operating under court supervision as it restructures following a market-making scandal, a co-founder’s suspension and exchange delistings that rocked the project.

articles.description: Bitcoin Magazine Coinbase Wants To Be Canada’s ‘Everything Exchange’ — With Crypto, Stocks, and Prediction Markets Coinbase is working to bring Canadian customers tokenized stocks and prediction markets in a push to become an "everything exchange." articles.title: Ether breaks the $1.9K resistance: Is $2.1K the next target for ETH bulls?
articles.description: Ether’s rally faces onchain headwinds, but rising staking demand and Google earnings could spark the push toward $2,100.

articles.title: Pavel Durov Wants to Give a Billion Telegram Users a Crypto Wallet
articles.description: The promise of instant, zero-fee crypto transactions for over a billion Telegram users sent its native Gram token up 7%.

articles.title: Bitcoin rally faces key test at $68,000 as 'summer slumber' grips crypto, analysts say
articles.description: BTC has rebounded 15% from the July lows, but some analysts cautioned that the next move hinges on clearing a level where many recent buyers may look to sell.

articles.title: White House Presses Senate Democrats To Accept Trump Ethics Deal On Clarity Act

articles.title: Pakistan steps up crypto enforcement with dedicated federal unit
articles.description: A senior official with Pakistan’s Federal Investigation Agency reportedly recommended other agencies establish similar units to address crypto-related crime.

articles.title: Google Ships New Gemini Flash Models, But Pro Is Still Missing
articles.description: As Gemini 3.5 Pro stalls in testing limbo, Google ships 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and a restricted cybersecurity model—and quietly teases Gemini 4.

articles.title: Pavel Durov says Telegram to roll out native Gram crypto wallet
articles.description: Telegram founder Pavel Durov said the messaging platform will roll out a native non-custodial Gram wallet this summer, bringing self-custody crypto transactions to its more than 1 billion users.

articles.title: White House pushes Senate Democrats to take 'historic' crypto Clarity Act ethics deal
articles.description: Without revealing any details about the actual agreement from President Trump on potential presidential restrictions, his White House is urging its acceptance.

articles.title: Augustus Raises $180 Million to Build a Stablecoin-Ready 'Global Dollar Bank'
articles.description: The Tiger Global-led round values the startup at $1 billion as it wires stablecoin rails directly into a federally chartered bank, aiming to modernize the correspondent-banking plumbing behind cross-border payments.

articles.title: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy months after token scandal
articles.description: The filing comes after months of upheaval that included a controversial market-making agreement, an internal investigation into its MOVE token launch and a Binance ban tied to its market maker.

articles.title: Crypto market breakout could accelerate as AI trade cools, analyst says
articles.description: Bitcoin topped $67,000 while crypto stocks rallied on optimism over US crypto legislation and signs investors may be rotating out of AI trades.

articles.title: White House agrees to ethics provisions in market structure bill
articles.description: The price of Bitcoin moved above $66,000 to reach a seven-week high on Tuesday as reports circulated of a deal with the White House to address ethics in the CLARITY Act.

articles.title: Google Is Building an AI Chip Just for Gemini—And Investors Already Moved On It
articles.description: Codenamed Frozen v2, Google's new server chip would bake part of Gemini's architecture directly into hardware for a projected 6–10x efficiency gain.

articles.title: BIS warns stablecoins could weaken capital controls in emerging markets
articles.description: Researchers found dollar-backed stablecoins are less affected by capital controls than traditional bank deposits, raising new questions about monetary sovereignty in emerging markets.

articles.description: The integration with validator Yuma gives millions of MEXC users access to Bittensor, an AI-focused blockchain whose ecosystem now spans 128 specialized subnets.

articles.title: Russia’s parliament passes crypto market law with $3,800 annual cap for retail investors
articles.description: While citizens still cannot use Bitcoin to buy groceries, the Kremlin is officially letting companies use digital tokens to bypass sanctions and other global trade hurdles.

articles.title: Augustus raises $180 million to build a clearing bank for the AI and stablecoin era
articles.description: The firm, freshly valued at $1 billion, aims to replace legacy correspondent banking with always-on infrastructure that connects traditional payment systems and stablecoins.

articles.title: MoneyGram's CEO says blockchain works best when customers don't know it's there
articles.description: In an interview with CoinDesk, MoneyGram CEO Anthony Soohoo said that their blockchain strategy has evolved from early experimentation into a broader effort to modernize the company's global payments infrastructure.

articles.title: CoinShares debuts Bitcoin mining ETF in Europe entrance
articles.description: The UCITS ETF, CoinShares’ first in Europe, began trading on Deutsche Börse Xetra, tracking a rules-based index of publicly listed BTC miners.

articles.description: Arcus, built by the dYdX team, adds tokenized stocks and perpetual futures on Robinhood Chain as platforms compete to bring traditional assets onchain.

articles.title: Morpho launches fixed-rate lending protocol on Base
articles.description: Morpho Midnight introduces fixed rates and defined maturities alongside Morpho Blue’s variable-rate lending markets.

articles.description: The proposed three-way merger between Twenty One Capital, Mallers' Strike, and Elektron Energy has been abandoned.

articles.title: Tether-backed Twenty One, Strike merger plan scrapped: Bloomberg

articles.description: The crypto firm's initiative arrives as researchers, exchanges, and the U.S. government warn that "Q-Day" may land as soon as 2030.

articles.description: Speculation that President Donald Trump agreed to a crucial ethics provision for the crypto market structure bill underpinned the gains.

articles.description: XRP pushed higher over 24 hours and tested short-term resistance, but the larger chart still needs a clean break above the $1.24-$1.28 supply zone to confirm a stronger reversal.

articles.title: Bank of Korea Scales Up CBDC Pilot With Half a Million Users
articles.description: Phase 1 of Project Hangang opened 81,000 wallets with 42% of them using the CBDC. Phase 2 is bigger, and this time it moves real government money.

articles.title: Russia's First Comprehensive Crypto Law Is Two Votes Away From Passing
articles.description: The bill licenses exchanges, caps retail investors at about $3,800 a year, and creates a legal pathway for Russian companies to pay foreign partners in crypto—bypassing Western sanctions.

articles.title: Cardano Triggers Hard Fork With First Community-Voted Upgrade
articles.description: For the first time in Cardano's history, no company flipped the switch on a major protocol update.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs Are Green Again—Here’s Why Investors Should Zoom Out
articles.description: Two consecutive weeks of inflows ended the worst sustained outflow streak in Bitcoin ETF history. Here's why patience may be required from investors.

articles.title: Tom Lee's Bitmine Taps the Brakes on ETH Buys, Pivots $86M Into Stock Buyback
articles.description: "The reduced pace of buys reflects that Bitmine repurchased 5.5 million common shares," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said in a statement.

articles.title: Strategy Pads Cash Reserve By $225M With MSTR Sale, Bitcoin Stash Remains Untouched
articles.description: For the second consecutive week, Saylor's company sold MSTR stock instead of BTC to pad its reserves to $3.2 billion.

articles.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
articles.description: An attacker used a flash loan to distort the bridge's Solana stablecoin pools before moving the proceeds to Ethereum, security firms said.

articles.title: Morning Minute: Hyperliquid Opens Prediction Markets to Anyone in HIP-4 Upgrade
articles.description: Plus, a selloff in Oil has markets looking green into the Monday open. And PUMP is leading all alt movers on the week at a surprising time.

articles.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor Makes 110-Point Case Against Bitcoin's BIP-110
articles.description: The Strategy chairman argued that the soft fork is a 'bad idea,' warning that it would cause more harm than the problem it aims to solve.

articles.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.6 Sol or Anthropic's Claude Fable 5: Which one is right for you? The answer depends on your needs. Here's our review.

articles.description: ECB board member Piero Cipollone laid out the three-layer threat banks face from digital payments, and pitched the digital euro as the only structural answer.

articles.title: Cardano Pumps as Network Moves to Further Decentralize Development
articles.description: Input Output is handing its core infrastructure to outside teams as ADA gets a lift from an imminent protocol upgrade.

articles.title: Kimi K3 Just Triggered DeepSeek Flashbacks for the Stock Market
articles.description: Moonshot AI's 2.8-trillion-parameter open-weight model sent chip stocks tumbling and gave Wall Street a Friday it would rather forget.
